content:
• ---

  • ### **6. Scalability and Performance**
  • Design with growth in mind:
  • - [ ] **Horizontal scaling**:
  • - Use container orchestration tools like Kubernetes for scaling workloads.
  • - Ensure stateless services to simplify scaling.
  • - [ ] **Load balancing**:
  • - Distribute traffic evenly with tools like NGINX, HAProxy, or cloud-native load balancers.
  • - [ ] **Caching**:
  • - Use caching layers (e.g., Redis, Memcached) for frequently accessed data.
  • - [ ] **Database optimization**:
  • - Optimize queries and indexes.
  • - Use read replicas and sharding for large datasets.

  • ---

  • ### **7. Collaboration and Knowledge Sharing**
  • Foster a culture of collaboration:
  • - [ ] **Documentation**:
  • - Maintain up-to-date documentation for code, APIs, and processes.
  • - Use a centralized platform (e.g., Confluence, Notion) for knowledge sharing.
  • - [ ] **Code reviews**:
  • - Set up mandatory code reviews for all pull requests.
  • - Use tools like GitHub Actions to enforce code quality checks.
